findings_history.notes: 64 tests. Fixed nodeContextMenu backdrop. mindmapApi service tests. Zero assertion failures.
Fixed useGraphInit.helpers.test.ts Vite transform error. Added mindmapAiApi.ts contract tests (11 tests). 69 files / 2270 tests.
140 new tests across 3 contract files. Hardened performance-500-nodes flake. 72 files / 2410 tests.
92 new tests + devWarn helper extracted, 33 callsites refactored across 14 files. 74 files / 2507 tests.
AiTutorPanel coverage 20→48 tests (pull-to-refresh formula, i18n parity, sub-components). Fixed 2 silent-crash i18n bugs (useDragConnect:110, useGraphControls:15). 74 files / 2537 tests.

GraphTemplatePanel deepened (was lowest test:src ratio at 0.21): added 26 tests covering BRAND palette pinning, pt/es i18n parity (zero key drift), pluralization rules (templateCount, nodesAndEdges), save validation (trim/empty/zero-nodes), error-message extraction (Error.message vs i18n fallback), stale-fetch guard via fetchIdRef, mountedRef discipline (8+ checks pinned), Escape suppression when child confirm dialogs are open, default locale='es'. Total GraphTemplatePanel coverage: 21→47 tests. Code quality: fixed THIRD silent-crash i18n bug in GraphTemplatePanel:169 — `translations[locale]` lacked the `?? translations.es` fallback (same defect class as cycle 18 fixes; could crash if a future caller passed a string-cast invalid locale). Added a same-file regression test pinning the fallback. Result: 74 files / 2563 tests, ALL PASSING. Phase 3/4 audits unchanged.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2563/2563 assertions pass; all 3 sites of the unguarded-locale-lookup defect class are now hardened and pinned by regression tests
